channel.title: Twitter - @elonmusk
channel.description: 自动生成的Twitter RSS - 最后更新: 2026-03-17 14:15 UTC | 来源实例: https://xcancel.com

item.title: @elonmusk: Latest Grok 4.20. Not incremental. Have you tried it? Multi-agent debate. Less guessing. More reason...
item.description: Latest Grok 4.20. Not incremental. Have you tried it? Multi-agent debate. Less guessing. More reasoning. Real-time X data. Zero lag brain. Reliability locked in.@Grok

item.title: @elonmusk: True. New Roadster unveil probably in late April.
item.description: True. New Roadster unveil probably in late April.

item.title: @elonmusk: Neuralink is not just going to repair sight - it's going to exceed the limits of human biology, even...
item.description: Neuralink is not just going to repair sight - it's going to exceed the limits of human biology, eventually delivering high-res vision that outperforms the best natural eyes "In the next 6 to 12 months, we’ll be doing our first implants for vision, where even if somebody is completely blind, we can write directly to the visual cortex." "Long term, you would have very high resolution and be able to see multispectral wavelengths... you could see in infrared, ultraviolet, radar. It's like a superpower situation." — Elon Musk

item.title: @elonmusk: The retro-futuristic style is very well done by Grok Imagine! I love it
item.description: The retro-futuristic style is very well done by Grok Imagine! I love it

item.title: @elonmusk: By this weekend, xAI will have three Grok Build models in training simultaneously
item.description: By this weekend, xAI will have three Grok Build models in training simultaneously

item.title: @elonmusk: Trial attorneys are the biggest scam. They pay plaintiffs to sue, take 90% of the verdict, and are o...
item.description: Trial attorneys are the biggest scam. They pay plaintiffs to sue, take 90% of the verdict, and are often funded by private equity. Trial attorneys make more than $40 billion a year just from fees. This is nothing but a public relations play. Don’t trust trial attorneys.

item.title: @elonmusk: SpaceX is Caesar’s XIII Legion level good
item.description: SpaceX is Caesar’s XIII Legion level good

item.title: @elonmusk: New Roadster unveil hopefully next month. It will be a banger next-level.
item.description: New Roadster unveil hopefully next month. It will be a banger next-level.

item.title: @elonmusk: Your creativity, amplified by AI Powered by Grok Imagine
item.description: Your creativity, amplified by AI Powered by Grok Imagine

item.title: @elonmusk: Grok Imagine is capable of generating many styles. It's so much fun to try them out! And always vide...
item.description: Grok Imagine is capable of generating many styles. It's so much fun to try them out! And always video extension up to 30sec

item.title: @elonmusk: The case for data centers in space:
item.description: The case for data centers in space:

item.title: @elonmusk: Please offer your prompts to help new users make beautiful images and videos
item.description: Please offer your prompts to help new users make beautiful images and videos

item.title: @elonmusk: Veil of Starlight and Foxfire Wings
item.description: Veil of Starlight and Foxfire Wings

item.title: @elonmusk: Grok Imagine Prompt Share: ethereal beautiful woman sitting gracefully in a vibrant wildflower meado...
item.description: Grok Imagine Prompt Share: ethereal beautiful woman sitting gracefully in a vibrant wildflower meadow, long wavy light-brown hair with large pink satin bow and flowing sheer veil, delicate off-shoulder pastel pink and lavender ruffled dress with puffy sleeves and flowing skirt, serene peaceful expression with soft downward gaze and gently closed eyes, surrounded by dense colourful wildflowers in pinks, purples, whites, blues and yellows, luminous soft watercolor painting style, delicate washes, dreamy glowing sunlight, pastel fantasy atmosphere, highly detailed, whimsical and romantic, masterpiece, best quality.

item.title: @elonmusk: Grok Imagine Extend from Frame💫 "Don't worry, my little friend, I will take good care of you"🥰 Sound...
item.description: Grok Imagine Extend from Frame💫 "Don't worry, my little friend, I will take good care of you"🥰 Sound ON🔊
